publishDecision.summary: The lead is usable, but it needs verification or tightening before it becomes the main post.
leadStrengths: Reuters is treated as a trusted source for the morning stack.
The headline has enough AI-specific signal to support strong downstream content.
leadRisks: The story is aging out of the ideal morning-news window.
The story still reads like a broad industry shift, which can lead to vague content if not tightened.
backupStrengths: TechCrunch is treated as a trusted source for the morning stack.
The headline has enough AI-specific signal to support strong downstream content.
policy signal stories are easier to explain clearly than broad industry-shift headlines.
backupRisks: The story is old for a morning news lead and may already feel stale.
